nasb.text: He said to him, “Behold, I grant you this request also, not to overthrow the town of which you have spoken.

esv.text: He said to him, “Behold, I grant you this favor also, that I will not overthrow the city of which you have spoken.

cnv.text: 有一位天使對他說：“這事我也答應你，你所說的這城，我必不傾覆。

ccb.text: 天使回答说：“好吧，我答应你，不毁灭那座小城。

csbs.text: 天使对他说：“看哪，这事我也答应你，不会倾覆你所说的这城。
